Treants' Friend Ring

Once in a while, the enemy that deals the greatest damage takes 65000 magic damage. Also, that enemy and all enemies within a small radius around them are set on fire. The burning enemies take 57600 damage and have their healing rate reduced by 65% for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
